title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is reported to be delivering 40% more capabilities in 2026 through AI adoption. High-adoption teams at PayPal deployed daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6 times faster than baseline.
